title: Person External Education Credentials
description: Credentials earned by persons outside of their home institution.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the person external education credential.

externalEducation.title: External Education
externalEducation.description: The details of the external education associated with the credential.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the External Education.

credential.title: Credential
credential.description: The academic credential (degree, diploma, etc.) the person earned at the institution.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Credential.

earnedOn.title: Earned On
earnedOn.description: The date when the person earned the credential.

disciplines.title: Disciplines
disciplines.description: The academic disciplines associated with the person's course of study at the institution.

items.title: Disciplines
items.description: The academic disciplines associated with the person's course of study at the institution.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Disciplines.

supplementalCredentials.title: Supplemental Credentials
supplementalCredentials.description: The supplemental academic credential (degree, diploma, etc.) the person earned at the institution.

credential.title: Credential
credential.description: The academic credential (degree, diploma, etc.) the person earned at the institution.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Credential.

earnedOn.title: Earned On
earnedOn.description: The date when the person earned the credential.

attendancePeriods.title: Attendance Periods
attendancePeriods.description: The periods associated with the person's attendance at the institution.

startOn.title: Start On
startOn.description: The date when the person's education at the institution began.

endOn.title: End On
endOn.description: The date when the person's education at the institution ended.

performanceMeasure.title: Performance Measure
performanceMeasure.description: A measurement of the student's educational performance at the institution (e.g. GPA).

recognitions.title: Recognitions
recognitions.description: The academic recognitions received by the person at the institution.

items.title: Recognitions
items.description: The academic recognitions received by the person at the institution.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Recognitions.

classSize.title: Class Size
classSize.description: The size of the person’s postsecondary school graduating class.

classPercentile.title: Class Percentile
classPercentile.description: The person's percentile within their postsecondary school graduating class.

classRank.title: Class Rank
classRank.description: The person's rank within their postsecondary school graduating class.
